steps.title: Attach the opening phrase
steps.content: The opening phrase "Wanting to celebrate the 100th anniversary of the Alaska Purchase" must describe the grammatical subject that follows the comma. The entity that logically wanted to celebrate is the Alaska Centennial Commission.

steps.title: Avoid dangling modifiers
steps.content: Choice A makes a contest the subject. Choice B makes an award the subject. Choice C makes a money amount the subject. None of those can want to celebrate an anniversary. The clause with the commission as the subject attaches the modifier correctly. The answer is D.
